subTitle: The evil scorpion monster, Bichhu Bhai, comes out of the sea to wreak havoc on baby Little Singham and his friends. So, the gang uses a banana boat they found to drive Bichhu Bhai back into the sea.

subTitle: A baby octopus finds its way out of the sea and sets out to capture Baby Little Singham and his friends. So, the gang devises a plan to chase him back into the sea.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Shera befriends Titoo's doppelganger, plotting to tarnish Titoo's reputation. However, Titoo secretly teams up with his look-alike to outwit Shera.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo wants to collect 20 coins from an oatmeal he dislikes to win a video game. However, he decides to throw a health party to gain coins sooner, but Shrea wants to disrupt his plan.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo's parents give each other the silent treatment, causing familial tension. However, Titoo concocts a series of amusing scenarios to rekindle their affection.

title: Titoo
subTitle: During a camping trip, Titoo and Shera vie for a prized cap. However, as Titoo takes the lead, Shera hatches a devious plan to sabotage his chances of winning.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo makes a secret plan with his brother and a magician to teach a lesson to the kids in his class for scaring him with fake ghosts.

title: Titoo
subTitle: A gang of helmet-clad thieves plunders the town, leaving residents bereft. As a result, Titoo springs into action to bring them to justice.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo's father dreads a school meeting due to past misdeeds. However, Titoo cleverly manipulates events to ensure his father attends.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo's father becomes inconvenienced when a bird's nest gets entangled in his hair. Consequently, Titoo decides to teach the culprit responsible a lesson.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo's life takes an unexpected turn when he meets a talking parrot. Subsequently, the bird quickly becomes his friend, offering peculiar solutions to Titoo's insomnia.

title: Titoo
subTitle: When an illegal construction threatens to destroy the town's beloved playground, Titoo organises a hunger strike in an attempt to halt the demolition.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Dr Pyarelal's new invention goes missing, with Bawal Bhai as the prime suspect. Consequently, Titoo quickly formulates a plan to recover the device.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo and his brother get sent to an exciting and adventurous forest camp by their parents to learn about the values of life.

subTitle: Krish, the reincarnation of Lord Krishna, is sent to safeguard the children of Mathura orphanage. There, he fights against the evil principal, Kanishk, in his own mischievous and inimitable way.

subTitle: Kris, Bablu and Kanishk contest the elections to become the class monitor. But while Kanishk has a demon attack Kris, Kris tries to rig the election to get more votes.

subTitle: Kris' friends start to suspect that something is wrong when Kris starts to act very strangely. Soon they learn that Tarak and Kanishk have disguised Chatur Chalbaaz as Kris to create chaos.

subTitle: In order to terrorise the children at the school, Kanishk decides to have Besurdas, the demonic music teacher, switch places with Vasudev, the PT teacher.

subTitle: Dr J, Suparna and Tarak band together to fight against Kansa's evil wrath. Meanwhile, Kanishk still wishes to defeat Kris and so fights a final battle to finish him off once and for all.

title: Kris Roll No 21
subTitle: Kanishk has Dr J steal Queen Moongila's diamond-studded tiara off of her. But when the queen finds her tiara missing, she suspects Kris and sends a force to retrieve it from him.

subTitle: Children and teachers compete against each other to come up with the best scientific experiment during the science fair. Meanwhile, Kanishk consults with Dr J and Patanga for ways to defeat Kris.
